scheduledTime.label: Scheduled time
scheduledTime.nudge: Only blocked time can teach us. Add a color, a name, a rough length — not to perform, but to see your week more clearly next time.

unscheduled.label: Unscheduled time
unscheduled.rule: Hours in the week with nothing on the calendar — often sleep, drift, or space you didn't name. We use this for your rest alarm below.

allocation.title: Where did time go this week?
